### Appointment of a children's guardian in proceedings not being specified proceedings or proceedings to which Part 14 applies E+W


16.4. —(1) [ F1 Except in proceedings under section 55A of the 1986 Act and without ] prejudice to rule F2 ... 16.6, the court must appoint a children's guardian for a child who is the subject of proceedings, which are not proceedings of a type referred to in rule 16.3(1), if—


[ F3 (1A) Without prejudice to rule 16.6, in proceedings under section 55A of the 1986 Act, the court must appoint a children’s guardian for a child where—


(2) The provisions of Chapter 7 of this Part apply where the appointment of a children's guardian is required in accordance with paragraph (1) [ F4 or paragraph (1A) ] . (“children's guardian” is defined in rule 2.3.)


Textual Amendments


F1 Words in rule 16.4(1) substituted (3.10.2016) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2016 (S.I. 2016/901) , rules 1 , 5(a) (with rule 9 )


F2 Words in rule 16.4(1) omitted (5.1.2026) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2025 (S.I. 2025/1242) , rules 1(3)(a) , 3


F3 Rule 16.4(1A) inserted (3.10.2016) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2016 (S.I. 2016/901) , rules 1 , 5(b) (with rule 9 )


F4 Words in rule 16.4(2) inserted (3.10.2016) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2016 (S.I. 2016/901) , rules 1 , 5(c) (with rule 9 )


### Requirement for a litigation friend E+W

metadata.title: Part 16 — Representation of Children and Reports in Proceedings Involving Children
